The '''skirmish on Endor''' was a conflict on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] between the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] and the [[Ice Demon]] [[Stagorr]]. The duel took place on the slopes of [[Ice Mountain]] and pitted the [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] of the two warriors against each other. Although Stagorr was equipped with several formidable Force techniques, he was unable to stand up to the power of Logray and his [[Staff of Logray|magical staff]]. Logray eventually overpowered Stagorr, and forced him into the inside of Ice Mountain where he remained trapped.

Stagorr was unable to escape his confines to set up a rematch until several years later.

==Behind the scenes==
Due to the power of Logray in relation to the powers of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] seen in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], the epic demeanor given to this conflict in [[Ewoks (1985) 6|''Ewoks'' 6]] is questionable.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 6|''Ewoks'' (1985) 6]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
